metadata.title: Perfect Timing and Angles Secure a Clean Double Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch how positioning and quick reflexes turn a tough 2v1 fight. Notice the smooth peeks and sharp shots that close out the round.
What’s your favorite angle to hold on attack or defense?

Drop your best clutch moments in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #clutch #fps
